steps.title: Identify the naming function
steps.content: The underlined phrase known collectively as the silversword alliance gives the name for the family of related plants that includes Dubautia latifolia.

steps.title: Reject extra claims
steps.content: Choice B says the phrase lists species, but it gives a group name. Choice C says it explains why one species is unique, which it does not. Choice D treats the phrase as the common name of only Dubautia latifolia. The phrase names a group of related plant species. The answer is A.
